reviews.comment:
Compliacdo el ingreso sobre Cabildo. Sacando eso, la atención siempre es buenísima. Los playeros super atentos. Sigan así

The entrance on Cabildo is tricky. Aside from that, the service is always excellent. The beach attendants are incredibly helpful. Keep it up!

They don't give you an invoice if you pay with the app. Whatever...

reviews.comment:
(+) Con la app de YPF siempre pago con descuento x semana y más aún canjeando puntos.
(-) El inflado de neumáticos te los cobran y aparte tenés que hacerte de monedas que nunca tenés, por ende tenés que recurrir a un playero.

(Translated by Google)
(+) With the YPF app, I always get a weekly discount, and even more so when I redeem points.

(-) They charge extra for tire inflation, and you also have to get coins that you never have, so you have to go to a gas station attendant.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPLWFmRmV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Desastre. El ACA es una burla a sus socios. No andan los postres, no ofrecen servicios. Cada día peor

(Translated by Google)
Disaster. The ACA is a mockery of its members. The desserts aren't working, they don't offer any services. It gets worse every day.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPd2JxX3lBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Se suele llenar ya que tienen el descuento con el ACA, pero es una buena estación. Tiene para cargar aire y comprar accesorios para el auto.

(Translated by Google)
It tends to get crowded because they offer a discount with the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), but it's a good station. They have air conditioning refills and sell car accessories.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPN3JXMmt3RRAB
